title: Allocation lifecycle
description: A successfully acquired local metadata object must be released, published, or transferred to an explicit owner before operation exit.

actions.description: Acquire a newly allocated metadata object.
Publish the allocation into its intended owner or namespace.
Transfer allocation responsibility to an explicit owner.

obligations.statement: Every successfully acquired allocation must be released, published, or transferred on every applicable exit.
applicability: the acquire action returned a valid object
automatic cleanup is not independently established
